title: Lemon Turkish Delight
description: A tangy and sweet dessert inspired by Turkish delights, with a twist of lemon.

ingredients.name: Turkish Delight
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern grocery stores

ingredients.name: Lemon Zest
ingredients.notes: Use a microplane for optimal zest

ingredients.name: Citrusy Syrup
ingredients.notes: Available at most baking supply stores

ingredients.name: Velvety Milk
ingredients.notes: Whole milk for the creamiest texture

instructions: In a large saucepan, combine the Turkish Delight, lemon zest, lemon juice, and citrusy syrup. Heat over low heat, stirring constantly.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the Turkish Delight has dissolved.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the velvety milk until well combined.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature, then cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
Just before serving, dust the top of the dessert with powdered sugar.
